question.label: Opening pace check
question.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
question.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

answer: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.

assessment.note: She can still deliver, but not feeling her impact is visible signals mild disengagement and some drag on sustainability; also opens a recognition thread.

new_queue.label: Visible impact
new_queue.name: When your impact isn't visible, where does that show up most?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Priority tradeoff
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?

issues: coverage: injected wellbeing into next question (0 touches after turn 4)

history.answer_excerpt: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
A lot of energy went into firefighting and context switching.
I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
